description_long: This is a sketch-style adult human figure with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose, commonly used for modeling or animation. The figure features a full head of medium-length, wavy hair and a prominent mustache and beard. The clothing appears to be a casual, loose-fitting jacket or shirt with visible seams and creases, paired with pants that are slightly wrinkled and fitted at the ankles. The shoes are simple and rounded, suggesting casual or everyday footwear. The overall form is slender, with naturalistic proportions and a relaxed stance. The linework is expressive and sketchy, giving the figure a hand-drawn, artistic appearance.
description: A sketchy, hand-drawn adult figure in a T-pose, wearing casual clothing with medium-length wavy hair and simple shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, outstretched arms, and detailed clothing creases.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair volume, and the relaxed posture of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the hair's length and shape, the back of the jacket, and the rear of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and the natural fall of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual jacket and pants with a relaxed fit
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
